MIMS ROLE DAY RATES — PRODUCER REVIEW
Generated May 23, 2026

HOW TO PASTE INTO GOOGLE DOCS:
1. Select everything below the header row (Role tab Base…)
2. Copy and paste into Google Sheets — columns will align automatically
3. Select the table in Sheets → Copy → Paste into Google Docs

NOTES FOR REVIEW:
- Base = expert anchor (10+ years), non-union, before rush/usage/client multipliers
- LA/NYC = base × 1.25 location adjustment used in the app
- Experience columns show how MIMS scales the base by career tier
- Unknown roles fall back to: shoot $650, post $850, design $750, dual $900

Role	Base (expert)	LA/NYC expert	0–1 yrs	1–3 yrs	3–5 yrs	5–10 yrs	10+ yrs
